# Python Binding — modern_colorthief

Install: `pip install modern_colorthief`

## API

```python
from modern_colorthief import get_palette, get_color

palette = get_palette(image, color_count=10, quality=10)  # list[tuple[int,int,int]]
color = get_color(image, quality=10)                      # tuple[int,int,int]
```

## Parameters

- `image`: `str | bytes | io.BytesIO | PIL.Image.Image` — file path, raw bytes, BytesIO, or PIL Image
- `color_count`: `int` — number of colors to extract (default: 10)
- `quality`: `int` — sampling quality 1-10 (default: 10)

## Image Decoding

Uses Pillow (transparent, auto-imported in Python layer).

## CLI

```bash
modern-colorthief photo.jpg              # dominant color as hex
modern-colorthief photo.jpg --palette    # palette as hex lines
modern-colorthief photo.jpg --count 5    # limit palette size
```
